title: Quarto Styler
text: A Quarto website that leverages Observable JS (OJS) for real-time simulation of styling.

title: Quarto Styler
text:
summarytools table styler
Generate CSS for for your table!

Use the inputs to adjust the CSS styling

Automatically updates and formats the CSS to be copied

Copy CSS in the “Copy” tab

Copy all css to clipboard using the button or
highlight and copy desired css below the button


This tool may work for other summarytools table outputs, but has only been tested with `dfSummary().
